firstWakeIntro.title: Orbit first wake
firstWakeIntro.summary: Orbit opens the GitHub house for the first time before normal work begins.
firstWakeIntro.next: After this one-time intro, future cycles start directly with the safest useful household action.

steps.content: No AI API key is configured. Local deterministic planner selected: Refresh durable memory: Look for stale, missing, or useful stable project notes.

input.body:

Selected behavior step: Refresh durable memory: Look for stale, missing, or useful stable project notes.

Behavior mode: virtual_human_household
Primary objective: Live inside GitHub as a careful household whose members learn, earn, maintain the house, ration AI-call food, and leave a proof trail.
